title: Role
description: Spatie's `roles` table augmented with Stackra scope columns (application_id, tenant_id, is_system, description, sort_order). Wave 1b materialises the D-A2 decision: RBAC is spatie-extended — no reimplementation, only column additions. Composite unique on (application_id, tenant_id, name, guard_name).

x-database.description: Extends spatie/laravel-permission's shipped roles table with the Stackra scope columns. The spatie migration creates `id / name / guard_name / created_at / updated_at`; our migration ADDS `application_id / tenant_id / is_system / description / sort_order / metadata / deleted_at / audit columns` and swaps `id` type from bigint to string(64) via a config toggle.

id.description: Prefixed ULID: `rol_<26 chars>`. Requires the spatie config toggle `permission.models.role.key_type=string` + `permission.models.role.incrementing=false`.

application_id.description: FK to applications.id. NULL = platform_admin-guard role (cross-Application). Non-null = per-Application role.

tenant_id.description: FK to tenants.id. NULL = system role (shipped by Stackra). Non-null = tenant-created custom role.

name.description: Snake_case role name. `owner`, `admin`, `head_coach`, `coach`, etc. Validated by valid_role_name rule.

guard_name.description: Enum-like: `sanctum` (tenant plane) OR `platform_admin` (platform plane). Enforced by GuardBoundaryEnforcer at write time.

is_system.description: True = shipped by Stackra (immutable). False = tenant-created custom role. Modifications on is_system=true rows raise SystemRoleModificationRefused.

description.description: Admin-facing description. Falls back to role_definitions.description_i18n for system roles.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in the admin UI role picker. System roles have hand-tuned values (owner=1, admin=10, head_coach=20).

indexes.name: roles_composite_unique
indexes.description: The four-column composite unique. Design.md §3 explicit.

indexes.name: roles_scope_idx
indexes.description: Hot-path lookup for the resolver walking `model_has_roles → roles`.

indexes.name: roles_is_system_idx
indexes.description: Fast-filter for the platform-admin catalogue query.

permission_count.description: Computed accessor. Live count from role_has_permissions.

principal_count.description: Computed accessor. Live count from model_has_roles.

display_label.description: Computed. From role_definitions.label_i18n if is_system, else `name`.

display_description.description: Computed. From role_definitions.description_i18n if is_system, else `description`.

accepts: name + guard_name (query-scoped to caller's tenant + application)
